(8. from email) cilium update for tproxy turn off by default.
(7. from email) Can coreweave confirm that following logs can be configured to be sent from telecaster to jpmc
(6. from email) Can coreweave confirm that telecaster will use a IP from the jpmc VPC to transport the logs to JPMC network ingestor.
(5.from email) Can coreweave standup 2 DNS servers(for HA) for us in our VPC which we can use as the servers which forwards request to JPMs for domain resolution.
(4 from email) can coreweave provide us the ip(s) which they plan to use for exposing s3 endpoint so that we can create dns entry for it and also network policies for pod
(3. from email) How will the token exchange endpoint to exchange a k8s oidc token to get a s3 token be exposed.
(2 from email) How do we allocate the FQDN for the cks cluster. Need to have a fqdn which we can resolve the cks api service with from jpmc network
(1. from email )How do we determine the IP for k8s cluster control plane api service.

CoreWeave & Nasdaq - InfoSec Discussion: InfoSec Discussion Tomas, you know, when we last spoke, I know there were other things like soc and iso certifications as well which we didn't have at the time. So just for your awareness, like we now have soc to type one and two, we have iso et cetera. There's an assignee on the product or on the f

Mercado Libre/CoreWeave: Production challenges that customers are seeing with training with inference. And with operationalizing gpu infrastructure and some of the challenges and what we're trying to do to help the customer solve those challenges. If you have any feature requests, customers love to talk to the product team
Mercado Libre/CoreWeave: GPU infrastructure
Mercado Libre/CoreWeave: product roadmap

[ENG/PM/SA Monthly] Workstream: Inference: We are taking away the concepts of like nodes. So the customer should be able to deploy a model on any type of what we call instance, which is a gpu type, number of gpus, number of cpus, and memory. I expect we would keep it relatively simple early if customers also have demand for scaling on specif
[ENG/PM/SA Monthly] Workstream: Inference: auto-scaling
[ENG/PM/SA Monthly] Workstream: Inference: customer simplification

CW+Mistral: SUNK Scheduler Feedback Discussion: The main feature request is the ability for you to have multiple kubernetes pods in a single node so that you can improve utilization of nodes instead of having fragmentation where a small model that only really needs two gpus is taking up a full node. Feature requests very clear, and then the docum
CW+Mistral: SUNK Scheduler Feedback Discussion: node fragmentation
CW+Mistral: SUNK Scheduler Feedback Discussion: MIG/MPS
CW+Mistral: SUNK Scheduler Feedback Discussion: documentation

GTM Enablement Session: 2/26/26: SLURM is not usable out of the box. SUNK provides a hybrid scheduler allowing customers to run inference and training in the same cluster. Storage should be a major component of the value proposition. CoreWeave AI object storage (Chaos) has features that provide incredible capability.
GTM Enablement Session: 2/26/26: storage
GTM Enablement Session: 2/26/26: Chaos

CrowdStrike Product Security Q&A on CW Architecture: Feature request: from an organizational standpoint, hierarchy with folders or projects to separate different clusters and craft policies toward teams. Continue to share the roadmap and take feedback to Andy and team for enterprise IAM features.
CrowdStrike Product Security Q&A on CW Architecture: multi-tenancy
CrowdStrike Product Security Q&A on CW Architecture: organizational hierarchy
CrowdStrike Product Security Q&A on CW Architecture: enterprise security

R&D Staff Meeting: We have a list of prioritized feature requests from our customers. We collated high priority requests from EMEA, NAMR, APAC customers. Customer feedback calls and surveys have been sent out for home page refactor.

TSM Team Meeting - Weekly: Weekly The name is customer requirements very intentionally instead of feature requests. We're focusing on collecting the voice of the customer. Don't wait for the customer to say I have a feature request. We're smarter than that.

Bi-Weekly - Hologen <> CoreWeave: Hologen <> CoreWeave Feature request: configure Chaos buckets and control panels accessible for a specific CKS cluster. Feature request for automated sharing of access to different Chaos buckets.
Bi-Weekly - Hologen <> CoreWeave: bucket access control
Bi-Weekly - Hologen <> CoreWeave: user provisioning

NPI Weekly Meeting: Customer PII concerns with managed products. Inference and database services are cases where we put customer data in CoreWeave managed products. Flexify data migration service - zero egress migration program for new customers. Midjourney wants the migration service.
NPI Weekly Meeting: PII compliance
NPI Weekly Meeting: managed services
NPI Weekly Meeting: Flexify

CoreWeave / SAP - Inference offerings: Inference offerings SAP AI core supports internal and external use cases. Internal teams building agentic solutions leveraging models. Integration with Weights and Biases provides LLM observability and request logging.
CoreWeave / SAP - Inference offerings: inference
CoreWeave / SAP - Inference offerings: LLM observability
CoreWeave / SAP - Inference offerings: agentic solutions

GTM Enablement Session: Mission Control: Mission control: the industry's first operating standard for AI cloud. Observability, automation, people, talent. Billable usage dashboard - customers asking for more visibility into spending and cost allocation.

Northflank <> CoreWeave Integration Feedback: White labeling, developer experience improvements, Google Cloud Run-like deployment on CKS. App platform running on top with CI/CD pipelines, one-click open weight models, postgres, redis.
Northflank <> CoreWeave Integration Feedback: app platform
Northflank <> CoreWeave Integration Feedback: CI/CD
Northflank <> CoreWeave Integration Feedback: one-click deployment

Hippocratic / CoreWeave - Inference Product Discussion: Inference Product Discussion Healthcare AI with strict SLAs. 20 different large language models with multi-node inference using InfiniBand. Questions about scheduling algorithms, caching strategy, and DeepGem implementation for pre-fill heavy workloads.
Hippocratic / CoreWeave - Inference Product Discussion: SLAs
Hippocratic / CoreWeave - Inference Product Discussion: InfiniBand
Hippocratic / CoreWeave - Inference Product Discussion: scheduling
RH AI Inference Product Overview: Proof of value for financial institution customers before contract signing. Red Hat OpenShift AI inference GA with early access programs.
RH AI Inference Product Overview: OpenShift AI
RH AI Inference Product Overview: PoV
RH AI Inference Product Overview: financial services

TSM Team Meeting - Customer Requirements Process: Customer Requirements Process TSM team focused on delighting customers through knowing the environment, having trust, sharing bad news effectively. Defining clear roles and responsibilities for proactive customer outreach and scope management.

CrowdStrike <> CoreWeave Weekly Sync: Feature request for Cluster API support. Portland/Hillsboro peering location request. Frankfurt Germany blocker for both GPU and peering. SUNK created because of customer demand - more than half of customers using it for training.
CrowdStrike <> CoreWeave Weekly Sync: SUNK adoption
CrowdStrike <> CoreWeave Weekly Sync: geographic expansion

GTM Enablement Session: Flex Reservations 3/5/26: Flex reservations: guaranteed capacity over long term commitment with variable demand - pay less when not in use (20% holding fee). Gap between RIs (cost prohibitive) and on-demand (not enough availability) for bursty workloads.
GTM Enablement Session: Flex Reservations 3/5/26: pricing
GTM Enablement Session: Flex Reservations 3/5/26: bursty workloads
FireworksAI Troubleshooting: Feature request to customize what constitutes a critical fault notification. Customer wants flexibility in alert configuration - current system not flexible enough.
TensorMesh <> CoreWeave: Collaboration around Chaos object storage and inference products. Cache insights as a unique product differentiator.
TensorMesh <> CoreWeave: inference
TensorMesh <> CoreWeave: caching
TensorMesh <> CoreWeave: partnership

Global Engineering Operations Review: Many requests from Heron - some make sense for CKS and BMAs going forward. Messy AI provided thorough feedback with feature requests for virtual DX features and group pod submissions through SLURM. Working on improving governance with customers to avoid stepping on different requests.
Global Engineering Operations Review: SLURM
Global Engineering Operations Review: virtual DX
Global Engineering Operations Review: customer governance
Modal + CoreWeave - BMaaS Kickoff: BMaaS Kickoff Modal requires public IP per host - assumption baked into their system. Discussion about Tailscale integration on CKS and private networking options.
Modal + CoreWeave - BMaaS Kickoff: networking
Modal + CoreWeave - BMaaS Kickoff: public IP
Modal + CoreWeave - BMaaS Kickoff: Tailscale
Modal + CoreWeave - BMaaS Kickoff: private networking
GTM Enablement Session: CAOIS Updates (Oct '25): Chaos relaunch with new features and pricing. Automated archive feature - nobody else has this. New object storage positioning.
GTM Enablement Session: CAOIS Updates (Oct '25): automated archive
GTM Enablement Session: CAOIS Updates (Oct '25): pricing
GTM Enablement Session: CAOIS Updates (Oct '25): product launch

PhysicsX <> CoreWeave - Storage: Storage Storage products walkthrough - Chaos, DFS (distributed file storage), dedicated storage, GPU local storage. Customer using GPU local storage for cache integrated with Chaos.
PhysicsX <> CoreWeave - Storage: data services

NPI Weekly Meeting - Database & Security: Database & Security CoreWeave Resource Locators (CRLs) - canonical identifier for resources across the company. Security products enabling restricted verticals and regulated environments. Database products putting customer data in CoreWeave managed products - PII compliance concerns.
Customer feedback and requests: Customer feedback and requests about capacity movements

NodePool Node Removal Documentation and Feature Request: Customer (Heron) feedback - In CKS, when downsizing a NodePool, scaling down doesn't let you control which node gets removed. There's a label for that: compute.coreweave.com/remove-node=true but it's not documented anywhere. This should be coming through as a feature request. Can we get these captur

W&B Logs Feature Feedback: Looking for customer feedback around live logs experience for streaming latest logs in real-time - technical trade-offs to consider. Related product board requests from Isomorphic, Atomic AI, Suno, Microsoft, Applied Intuition, Pinterest.

Weave Governance Requests from Customers: Complete collection of governance requests from Weave customers. Enterprises using Weave are asking for more visibility/predictability and control of their spend.

Q1 2026 Engineering Leadership Offsite - Customer Feedback: Customer Feedback Continue developing customer request process to better capture and prioritize customer asks. More self-service capabilities requested. Customer obsession, while being more intentional about how requests are handled. Be the best in terms of providing the most reliable and resilient
GSK Customer Feature Requests and Bugs: Jira filter of GSK's outstanding feature requests and bugs - prioritising/surfacing customer feedback from EMEA QBR workshop.
AstraZeneca Customer Feature Requests and Bugs: Jira filter of AstraZeneca's outstanding reported feature requests and bugs from EMEA QBR workshop.
Quadrature Customer Feature Requests and Bugs: Jira filter of Quadrature's outstanding reported feature requests and bugs from EMEA QBR workshop.
Kaiko Customer Feature Requests and Bugs: Jira filter of Kaiko's outstanding feature requests and bugs from EMEA QBR workshop.

Isomorphic Customer Feature Requests: Jira filter of Isomorphic's feature requests and bugs. Discovery has taken place to establish bugs or feature requests. Last three FRs that Matteo talked with Tristan around are being considered - Product would expect to let us know in Q1 if/what they can do.

W&B Billing Customer Complaints: Customer complaint about billing transparency - never consented to enterprise-level pricing. Suggestion: in the onboarding flow add 'remember this is the plan you selected and how you will be charged' and confirmation email. Another customer complaining about $2,718 unauthorized charge on Pro plan.

Hologen Managed Grafana Historical Metrics: Customer asked for per-user historical metrics in managed Grafana. Customer Feature Requirement board was introduced to CX to share customer feedback and feature requests.
